entries.title: CrewAI 1.0 tool selection naming update
entries.body: CrewAI 1.0 examples and compatibility notes were updated to use tool_choice instead of function_call when integrating with modern LLM tool invocation APIs.

entries.title: Sequential task execution defaults revised
entries.body: The framework now recommends explicit process configuration for sequential crews instead of relying on older implicit defaults in setup examples.
